full_text:
NETFLIX BRAND ASSETS: TERMS & 
CONDITIONS 
INTERNAL COMPLIANCE DOCUMENT: MASTER LICENSE AGREEMENT 
DATE OF RELEASE: March 7, 2026 
LOCATION: Los Gatos, California 
SUBJECT: Brand Assets and Materials License Agreement 
 
I. PREAMBLE AND ACCEPTANCE OF TERMS 
By downloading, receiving, or accessing any Netflix trademarks, logos, trade names, service 
marks, or other distinctive features (“Netflix Brand Assets”) via brand.netflix.com, You (“The 
User”) agree to be legally bound by these Terms and Conditions. 
CONFLICT OF TERMS: In the event of a conflict between these Terms and any 
existing written agreement between You and Netflix, the provisions of the specific 
written agreement shall prevail. 
 
II. GRANT OF LICENSE 
2.1 Limited Scope 
Netflix hereby grants You a limited, non-exclusive, revocable, non-sublicensable, and 
non-transferable license to display the Netflix Brand Assets solely in accordance with the 
Requirements set forth in Section III. 
2.2 Ownership and Goodwill 
Nothing herein grants You any right, title, or interest in the Netflix Brand Assets. All use of the 
Netflix Brand Assets (including any associated goodwill) shall inure exclusively to the benefit of 
Netflix. 
 
III. OPERATIONAL REQUIREMENTS AND RESTRICTIONS 

The User agrees to adhere to the following strict guidelines unless prior written permission is 
obtained via a Request for Approval: 
1.​ NO MODIFICATION: Do not remove, distort, or alter any element of the Brand Assets. 
Do not alter color codes or create acronyms. 
2.​ NO INCORPORATION: Brand Assets shall not be incorporated into Your own product 
names, service names, trademarks, or domain names. 
3.​ NO ENDORSEMENT: Do not display Assets in a manner that implies sponsorship, 
affiliation, or endorsement by Netflix. 
4.​ CONTENT RESTRICTIONS: Usage is strictly prohibited on platforms containing: 
○​ Pornography or adult content. 
○​ Gambling or related activities. 
○​ Tobacco, alcohol, or firearms (marketed to persons under 21). 
 
IV. MATERIALS LICENSE AGREEMENT 
4.1 Definition of Materials 
"Netflix Materials" includes all artwork, images, graphics, photographs, video clips, and audio 
available on the Netflix Brand Site. 
4.2 Indemnification 
You agree to indemnify, hold harmless, and defend Netflix and its affiliates from any and all 
claims, losses, and expenses (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising out of Your use of 
the Netflix Materials or any breach of this Agreement. 
 
V. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY 
THE NETFLIX BRAND ASSETS AND MATERIALS ARE PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS 
AVAILABLE." NETFLIX DISCLAIMS ALL WARRANTIES, INCLUDING NON-INFRINGEMENT. 
NETFLIX SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY DIRECT, INDIRECT, OR CONSEQUENTIAL 
DAMAGES ARISING FROM THE USE OF THESE ASSETS. 
 
VI. GENERAL PROVISIONS 
●​ Governing Law: The laws of the State of California shall govern this Agreement. 
●​ Jurisdiction: The exclusive venue for any dispute shall be Santa Clara County, 
California. 
●​ Termination: Netflix reserves the right to terminate or modify Your permission to use 
Brand Assets at any time, at its sole discretion.
